# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> A captain-owned yachting firm based in South Florida. We handle yacht brokerage, management and detailing, refit and engineering, charter, and crew placement for owners along the Atlantic coast and across the Caribbean.

## Services

- [Brokerage & Acquisition](https://acmarine.co/services/brokerage): Buying and selling motor and sailing yachts across South Florida, the Bahamas, and the Caribbean. Off-market and publicly listed vessels.
- [Yacht Management](https://acmarine.co/services/yacht-management): Day-to-day operations, accounting, insurance, crew contracts, classification, and regulatory filings for private vessels.
- [Detailing & Daily Stewardship](https://acmarine.co/services/detailing): Wash, polish, varnish, paint, teak, stainless, and interior care, supervised on a standing schedule.
- [Refit & Project Oversight](https://acmarine.co/services/refit): Owner's representation at the shipyard, daily yard attendance, invoice audit, and launch trials.
- [Crew Placement](https://acmarine.co/services/crew): Captains, mates, engineers, chefs, stewards, and deckhands placed on yachts across South Florida.
- [Charter Programmes](https://acmarine.co/services/charter): Operating an owner's charter program or arranging a private charter for clients.
- [Engineering & Technical Counsel](https://acmarine.co/services/engineering): Repower studies, propulsion modelling, navigation electronics, and classification advisory.
- [Berths, Transits & Concierge](https://acmarine.co/services/concierge): Marina reservations, customs and immigration, transit planning, fuel, and provisioning.

## Locations

- [Miami](https://acmarine.co/locations/miami)
- [Fort Lauderdale](https://acmarine.co/locations/fort-lauderdale)
- [Palm Beach](https://acmarine.co/locations/palm-beach)
- [Naples](https://acmarine.co/locations/naples)

## Brokerage Listings

- [Yachts for sale](https://acmarine.co/brokerage): publicly listed motor and sailing yachts. Many of our listings are not shown publicly.

## Articles

- [Articles & guides](https://acmarine.co/articles): practical writing on buying and selling yachts, ongoing management, detailing, and crew placement across South Florida and the Caribbean.
